# 🛑 STOP — do not file security issues publicly

If you have found a security vulnerability in Promethea, **please do not file a public issue**. Instead, follow the disclosure flow in [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md):

- Email `security@promethea-os.org` (PGP-encrypted preferred), or
- Open a [private security advisory](https://github.com/promethea-os/promethea/security/advisories/new) on this repository.

Public disclosure of an unpatched vulnerability harms users. The PSIRT will acknowledge your report within 24 hours.

If you have already filed this issue publicly, **please close it immediately** and use one of the private channels above. Thank you.
